# ILSAstats

Calculates point estimates and standard errors using replicate weights
and plausible values for International Large-Scale Assessments (ILSA),
including: means, proportions, quantiles, correlations, singlelevel
regressions, and multilevel regressions.

## Installation

You can install the stable version of `ILSAstats` directly from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("ILSAstats")
```

Or, if you wish to install the development version of `ILSAstats`:

``` r
remotes::install_github("dopatendo/ILSAstats")
```

## Create replicate weights

Before working with replicate weights statistics we need to be sure to
create the replicate weights (if they are not provided within the data).
For an example on how to create them see
[`vignette("repweights")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/repweights.md).

## Setup

When doing multiple estimations we may need to use the same options more
than one time. For an example on how to create a setup object for
`ILSAstats` see
[`vignette("setup")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/setup.md).

## Means

For an example on estimating means using replicate weights and plausible
values see
[`vignette("means")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/means.md).

## Proportions

For an example on estimating proportions using replicate weights and
plausible values see
[`vignette("proportions")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/proportions.md).

## Quantiles

For an example on estimating quantiles using replicate weights and
plausible values see
[`vignette("quantiles")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/quantiles.md).

## Correlations

For an example on estimating correlations using replicate weights and
plausible values see
[`vignette("correlations")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/correlations.md).

## League tables

For an example on estimating league tables automatically see
[`vignette("leaguetables")`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/articles/leaguetables.md).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ILSAinfo`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/ILSAinfo.md)
  : ILSA information
- [`WeMixPV()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/WeMixPV.md)
  : Survey Weighted Mixed-Effects Models with Plausible Values
- [`autoILSA()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/autoILSA.md)
  : Options for automatic functions
- [`center()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/center.md)
  [`grand.mean()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/center.md)
  [`group.mean()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/center.md)
  [`getgroup.mean()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/center.md)
  : Centering
- [`icc()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/icc.md) :
  Intraclass Correlation Coefficient
- [`leaguetable()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/leaguetable.md)
  : ILSA's league tables
- [`lmerPV()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/lmerPV.md)
  : Linear Mixed-Models with Plausible Values
- [`prepILSA()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/prepILSA.md)
  : Prepare ILSA Data
- [`proflevels()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/proflevels.md)
  : ILSA's proficiency levels
- [`proflevels.get()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/proflevels.get.md)
  : Get ILSA's proficiency levels
- [`repcreate()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repcreate.md)
  [`repcreateILSA()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repcreate.md)
  : Creation of Replicate Weights
- [`repdata`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repdata.md)
  : Simulated data with 5000 cases
- [`repglm()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repglm.md)
  : Generalized Linear Models with Replicate Weights
- [`replm()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/replm.md)
  : Linear Models with Replicate Weights
- [`repmean()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repmean.md)
  : Mean, Variance and Standard Deviation with Replicate Weights
- [`repmeanCI()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repmeanCI.md)
  : Confidence Intervals for Replicated Means
- [`repmeandif()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repmeandif.md)
  : Mean Difference of Independent Samples with Replicate Weights
- [`repprop()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repprop.md)
  : Proportions with Replicate Weights
- [`repprop.table()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repprop.table.md)
  : Tables for Proportions with Replicate Weights
- [`repquant()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repquant.md)
  : Quantiles with Replicate Weights
- [`reprho()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/reprho.md)
  : Correlations with Replicate Weights
- [`repse()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repse.md)
  [`repsecomp()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repse.md)
  [`pvse()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repse.md) :
  Standard Error for Estimates with Replicate Weights and Plausible
  Values
- [`repsetup()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repsetup.md)
  [`repsetupILSA()`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/repsetup.md)
  : Setup for Analysis with Replicate Weights
- [`timss99`](https://dopatendo.github.io/ILSAstats/reference/timss99.md)
  : Random TIMSS 99 data with 3000 cases and 3 countries
